title: Chixozhmix Revival
description: Resurrect your friends in Hardcore Mode
body:
This mod allows you to resurrect your friends in Hardcore mode. There are two items available to you for this: the Resurrection Altar and the Resurrection Catalyst.
By using the Catalyst on the Altar, when there are players nearby in Spectator mode, you instantly resurrect them, putting them back into survival mode.

 

The mod adds the following items:

The Altar of Resurrection. This item is useless by itself, but if you use a Resurrection Catalyst on it, all players in Spectator mode will be switched to survival mode.

The catalyst for Resurrection. This item must only be used on the Resurrection Altar to resurrect friends.

 

The mod was created specifically for the Clash of Epochs modpack, but you can use it in your builds. Theitems don't have creation recipes, so you need to add them yourself (For example, through CraftTweaker). This is done so that you candetermine for yourself how difficult it will resurrect your friends.
